description_long: This is a modern desk with a black rectangular tabletop and four slender, tapered wooden legs. The desk features a built-in raised section on one side, likely for additional workspace or storage, and a single visible drawer beneath the main surface. Several green potted plants are arranged along the back edge of the desk, adding a decorative and natural touch. A closed laptop sits centrally on the main work surface, suggesting the desk is used for computer-based tasks. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with a combination of dark and natural wood tones that give it a contemporary urban appeal.
description: A sleek, modern desk with a black top, wooden legs, a raised side section, and decorative green plants along the back edge.
description_view_0: Side view showing the desk's depth, the row of green plants, the laptop, and the raised section with a visible drawer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main workspace, the central laptop, and the arrangement of plants along the back edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the desk, the row of plants, and the raised section's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full row of plants, the back of the laptop, and the clean, uninterrupted desk surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the drawer and open leg space, while the back edge features a row of decorative plants and a raised section for additional storage or display.
